name: Accordion
description: A set of collapsible sections where each item can be independently expanded or collapsed. Use when you need to progressively disclose content to reduce visual clutter.
instructions: Always compose as Accordion.Root > Accordion.Item > Accordion.Header + Accordion.Content. Each Accordion.Item requires a unique string value prop. Use Accordion.Slot with name="action" inside Accordion.Header to place action buttons (e.g. edit/delete) on the right side of the header. Use Accordion.Slot without a name for badge-style secondary content. Add divider prop to Accordion.Content to show a separator between header and content.
